base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of time_up_screen — a ui from 1985 super mario bros. Time-expired screen — black background with centered 'TIME UP' text. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Time-expired screen — black background with centered 'TIME UP' text; triggers Mario die sequence after display
